primary_gap_causes: grammar_nodes.json appears empty from GitHub contents read
cross-skill role matrix not yet present
operator_risk_statement: A system may mark A1/A2/B1/B2 complete while EGP grammar rules are not actually covered unless this coverage matrix and validator layer are implemented.
recommended_remediation_sequence_after_s: Create or populate grammar_nodes.json with stable grammar_id records.
Map grammar_nodes to EGP row IDs with alignment_status.
Create grammar_edges.json with prerequisite and dependency relations.
Generate grammar_order_table.json from nodes, edges, stage map, and policy.
Generate cefr_egp_alignment_table.json with EGP coverage metrics.
Generate grammar_query_index.json for ReadingV1 and cross-skill lookup.
Add validator report and CI checks for blocked grammar and EGP coverage.
